failedAssertions.reason: Computed-font audits still show 5 visible-text violations per page (dashboard/agents/issues) using ui-monospace stack instead of JetBrains Mono.
Status markers are 6x6 squares, but observed colors do not match required mapping (alive=#82E88A, error=#FF6060, idle=transparent+border): sampled markers render white or warn-toned fills.
Typography audits found only 4 compliant section-label instances (dashboard) and none on agents/issues; requirement is 5+ labels at 9-10px, 1-1.5px letter spacing, fg-dim color.

Computed-style evidence includes multiple visible button instances that do not meet the primitive contract (e.g., 0px or 2px-dashed borders, non-11px font sizes, non-uppercase text), even though some button instances are compliant.

Representative controls do not satisfy the full primitive contract: search input is monospace/transparent/1px/no-radius/appearance-none but remains 14px (not 11px), and New Issue title textarea is 18px with 0px border.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that primitive input/textarea audits may require opening Issues -> New Issue modal in read-only mode to collect representative textarea evidence.

frictions.description: agent-browser network requests returned no captured entries in this session.
frictions.resolution: Used screenshots and DOM/computed-style audits as primary evidence and logged no-request output for traceability.

frictions.description: API-abort loading-state simulation did not surface visible 'loading...' text in dashboard.
frictions.resolution: Relied on spinner-specific CSS/DOM audits and blocked-state screenshot evidence.

frictions.description: Several pages exposed no visible input/textarea controls for primitive inspection.
frictions.resolution: Opened Issues -> New Issue modal without submitting to capture representative textarea computed styles while remaining read-only.
